records.question: Which stations installed on 8/15/2013 currently have exactly 8 bikes available?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
JOIN status ON station.id = status.station_id
WHERE status.bikes_available = 8 AND station.installation_date = '8/15/2013'
records.pred_sql: select station.id from station join status on status.station_id = station.id where station.installation_date = '8/15/2013' and status.bikes_available = 8 limit 5;
records.thought: We need stations with installation_date '8/15/2013' and join with status to find those with bikes_available = 8.

records.question: Which stations in San Francisco have exactly 15 docks and a longitude of at least -122.40512700000001?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
JOIN status ON station.id = status.station_id
WHERE station.city = 'San Francisco' AND station.dock_count = 15 AND station.long >= -122.40512700000001
records.pred_sql: select station.id from station where lower(city) like '%san francisco%' and dock_count = 15 and long >= -122.40512700000001 limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter stations where city is San Francisco, dock_count is 15, and longitude is at least -122.40512700000001.

records.question: What stations named Grant Avenue at Columbus Avenue, installed on 8/21/2013 with no more than 15 docks, longitude exactly -122.40724499999999, latitude at most 37.798522, have exactly 4 docks available and at most 11 bikes available on or before 2015-06-02 13:15:02?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
JOIN status ON station.id = status.station_id
WHERE status.bikes_available <= 11 AND station.long = -122.40724499999999 AND station.lat <= 37.798522 AND station.installation_date = '8/21/2013' AND status.docks_available = 4 AND station.name = 'Grant Avenue at Columbus Avenue' AND status.time <= '2015-06-02 13:15:02' AND station.dock_count <= 15
records.pred_sql: select station.id from station join status on status.station_id = station.id where lower(station.name) like '%grant avenue at columbus avenue%' and station.installation_date = '8/21/2013' and station.dock_count <= 15 and station.long = -122.40724499999999 and station.lat <= 37.798522 and status.docks_available = 4 and status.bikes_available <= 11 and status.time <= '2015-06-02 13:15:02' limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter stations by name, installation_date, dock_count, longitude, and latitude, then join with status to filter by docks_available, bikes_available, and time. All conditions must be met, and we select station.id with limit 5.

records.question: Which stations named Park at Olive have exactly 15 docks and a longitude of at most -122.13777749999998 with a latitude exactly at 37.425683899999996?

records.question: What stations named exactly SJSU 4th at San Carlos currently have at least 11 bikes available?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
JOIN status ON station.id = status.station_id
WHERE status.bikes_available >= 11 AND station.name = 'SJSU 4th at San Carlos'
records.pred_sql: select station.id from station join status on status.station_id = station.id where station.name = 'SJSU 4th at San Carlos' and status.bikes_available >= 11 order by status.time desc limit 5;
records.thought: We need to find stations with the exact name 'SJSU 4th at San Carlos' and at least 11 bikes available in the current (latest) status. We'll join station and status, filter by name and bikes_available, and select station.id with limit 5.

records.question: Which stations named San Salvador at 1st in San Jose were installed on 8/5/2013, have exactly 15 docks, a longitude at most -121.88583100000001, and a latitude at least 37.330165?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
WHERE station.installation_date = '8/5/2013' AND station.city = 'San Jose' AND station.name = 'San Salvador at 1st' AND station.long <= -121.88583100000001 AND station.lat >= 37.330165 AND station.dock_count = 15
records.pred_sql: select station.id from station where lower(station.name) like '%san salvador at 1st%' and lower(station.city) like '%san jose%' and station.installation_date = '8/5/2013' and station.dock_count = 15 and station.long <= -121.88583100000001 and station.lat >= 37.330165 limit 5;
records.thought: We need to filter the station table by name, city, installation_date, dock_count, longitude, and latitude as specified in the question.

records.question: Where is the Ryland Park station in San Jose that was installed on 4/9/2014, has at most 15 docks, longitude at least -121.89561699999999, and latitude at most 37.342725?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT station.id FROM station
WHERE station.name = 'Ryland Park' AND station.dock_count <= 15 AND station.city = 'San Jose' AND station.installation_date = '4/9/2014' AND station.long >= -121.89561699999999 AND station.lat <= 37.342725
